headline: Google TurboQuant Puts Western Digital AI Storage Growth In Focus
summary: Google has introduced TurboQuant, a new algorithm designed to cut AI memory requirements, prompting questions about future demand for storage and memory. The announcement has drawn attention to major suppliers such as Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC), as investors reassess assumptions about AI driven hardware needs. The news has triggered an immediate market reaction, suggesting that investors view the development as material for memory and storage providers. Western Digital, a key provider...
